COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JULY 12, 2021)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Priscilla Guardado, appearing in pro per, for respondent/plaintiffs;
Megan Tian, a.k.a. Meghan Tian, appearing in pro per, for appellant/defendants.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Respondent/plaintiff, Priscilla Guardado testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibits are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - (4) color photos - ID/Admitted
Exhibit 2 - (2) pg. Document - Veterinary bills - ID/Admitted

Appellant/defendant, Megan Tian testifies on her own behalf. The following exhibits are introduced:
Exhibit A - (1) color photo - ID/Admitted
Exhibit B - video recording of building courtyard - ID/Admitted

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes the matter UNDER SUBMISSION. No exhibits are retained. Exhibits are returned to the offering parties.

Judge: Gerardo Sandoval; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 608.
